news.t: Sustainable Investing: 4 Earth Day ETFs targeting clean water, wind, the smart grid — and one that has them all
Best Impact Investing ETFs for Q2 2021

holdings.infoBox: GRID is an equity ETF with a total of 126 individual holdings. The top holdings are ABB Ltd stock at 8.33%, Eaton Corporation at 7.91%, Johnson Controls International at 7.63%, Schneider Electric S.E. at 7.14%, and National Grid at 6.59%.

overview.description: The First Trust Nasdaq Clean Edge Smart GRID Infrastructure Index (GRID) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a modified market-cap-weighted index of global equities in the smart grid and electrical energy infrastructure sector. GRID was launched on Nov 17, 2009 and is issued by First Trust.
